message:
test(proptest): expand fd_budget (11→20) and recorder_replay (11→18) property tests (wa-1u90p.7.1)

- fd_budget: add serde roundtrips for FdBudgetConfig, FdSnapshot, AuditResult,
  SystemLimits, LimitValidation, LimitCheck; add config-from-empty-JSON defaults,
  serialization determinism, and double-register behavior
- recorder_replay: add serde roundtrips for ReplayConfig, ReplayStats, ReplayState;
  add config defaults from empty JSON, ReplayState snake_case serialization,
  and combined pane+kind filter test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
